{{Item
| image = Starter bundle.png
| id = starter_bundle
| type = Utilities
| stackable = 64
| Description = Contains Items which assists you in starting with Doggy Talents Next. These includes:
}}

'''Starter Bundle''' is an item that gives you certain items to make the game a bit easier (suitable for beginners). These includes:

* [[Doggy Charm]] x1
* [[Whistle]] x1
* [[Radio Collar]] x1
* [[Canine Tracker]] x1
* [https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Stick Stick] x1
* [https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Bone Bone] x1

==Obtaining==
===Upon Create New World===
If you have '''<code>enable_starting_items</code>''' set to '''<code>true</code>''' on your server configuration file. 

=== '''Creative Menu''' ===
Press '''<code>E</code>''' in Creative mode to access the Creative menu.

==Usage==
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.
==Trivia==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.17.0.
* The item's sprite was designed based on the [https://okami.fandom.com/wiki/Treasure_chest Treasure Chests] from the game <s>that started it all</s> - Okami
